reviews.review_description: This game is way underrated, When I got my quest I looked at videos of best games to buy and not one of them showed this game! This is my favourite game on quest now by far. The only reason I found it is because of horizon +. I love all the elements of the game and the style. Im so annoyed this isn't a popular game because it should be! Thank you to the creators of this game. 10/10

Anyone in the family can play this game. The graphics are absolutely beautiful. The story is very good. Mixed reality is great. There’s no fighting shooting or killing which is nice. Just saving plants and a good story about saving the planet. Pretty groovy music and graphics. Loved it!

I wanted to like this game. Graphics are nice and the game is entertaining and unique. Kept running into glitches though. When I would quit game and go back in, certain important items would be missing, or moved halfway into my wall where I couldn't interact with them. Got tired of restarting game and re placing items.

I thought this game was so cool at first but then I got to a point where it seemed to stop working. It told me to set the bot in the shoot to go out and explore, which I did, but then it wouldn’t do anything from there no matter what I tried. So, I couldn’t go any further in the game. :(

developer_response.body:
if you want to join our Discord here and submit a ticket we can try and sort out what the issue is for you :) 
https://discord.gg/6qdMNNbx

reviews.review_description: Devs pushed out two updates very close to release and said "We'll see you in 2025 with more exciting updates!" and an entire year plus goes by and no updates even on the beta channel. A target demographic is one thing, promising updates and not delivering on them is ridiculous.
About halfway through the game glitches and wont let you go any further. It's a shame to as the vr in this game is amazing. Really wished I could continue on playing.

developer_response.body:
if you want to join our Discord here and submit a ticket we can try and sort out what the issue is for you :) 
https://discord.gg/6qdMNNbx

reviews.review_description:
- stop game play and comeback 3 weeks later = redo setup of item
- moving things around is not intuitive- especially not the catch and hold features
- gameplay is not intuitive- I am requested to do things but unclear how - like investigate 3 new planets but without seeing them or trigger them or get any help 

Wasted 10 min to find things out - did not work - stopped playing and be angry

Starship Home definitely sets a high bar for MR games. You start with one object to place in the room, and by the end of the game you have 15, all of them animated and even interacting with each other. The story is sort of spoon-fed, and the characters are a little silly. I can see my 8YO granddaughter enjoying this game just as much as I did.
It also helps that I enjoy raising plants, as you acquire one shortly after starting the game and end up with more than half a dozen (all of which need water, the right kind of fertilizer, and some occasional weeding). It's the major task of the game, and gets a little stressful sometimes trying to keep all of them happy at the same time. That was fun for me!
I really appreciated the hint at the end of returning to each planet, which I haven't done yet but plan to! I'm looking forward to more MR games from Creature.

Really enjoyed the game and how it brought the room into consideration. Was a little boring and repetitive after a bit, but we still got through the full game. Enjoyed the storyline and would definitely recommend for kids.
Very good attention to detail, great story, worth $20.
Loved the adventure. Thank you for the entertaining time spent.

reviews.review_title: I don't like taking care of plants
reviews.review_description: This had me taking constant care of not 1, not 2, but 3 plants before I gave up. It wasn't for me. Obsessively watering and fertilizing and pulling weeds. And to not even be rewarded for that to be able to go outside and explore the planets. Being in MR in my small apartment while pretending to be in a spaceship going through space doesn't do a thing for me either. But I didn't try to find out if I could maybe change that somewhere in settings. I was too busy taking care of plants.
It was glitchy for me, had to restart the game a few times over. I couldn't push certain buttons for instance. I lost a window that attached itself to the ceiling, but in a crooked position.
I found it to be too repetitive for me

I tried 3 times to set up my star ship, everytime things were either overlapping and I couldn't see any of them fully, or they were being set up way too far away from me.
If only you had good settings! Or an option to play seated. Not for me, but graphics were nice.

developer_response.body: sorry you were having this issue - this may be due to issues with the room scan data - happy to help you troubleshoot if you want to come to our discord and submit a support ticket: https://discord.gg/rnuhMkRz

reviews.review_title: Love the premise but so glitchy
reviews.review_description: I loved how this game started out. I was really into it as were my kids, but then it said it didn't recognize our room scan which we redid, only to find that after resetting up the starship, we could never get back to our place in the story because the original dream plant is never given to us again. I wish we could actually finish it because it was something everyone in our family enjoyed.

developer_response.body: sorry you're having this issue! this may be related. to a Meta OS issue - happy to help you troubleshoot if you want to join our discord and submit a support ticket: https://discord.gg/rnuhMkRz

reviews.review_description: This game is cute. It has really great use of mixed reality and the tasks keep you busy while you progress through the story. Just a really neat, cute and fun experience.

i really enjoyed playing this game. It required me to care for multiple plants, yes... and to continue fertilizing and watering them but I really liked the story line and the activity and having a spaceship in my living room. I cant wait to play again!

It is really fun using the airlock and other things. Some things are a little to repetitive. It is really easy to set up. something's also take a little too long to do certain things like scanning and fertilizing the plants.

reviews.review_title: A little more fertiliser on the plant...
reviews.review_description:
So, the room scan issue is fixed, and now we have taken off, but if I hear "A little more fertiliser on the plant..." one more time!!!  I gave the plant the red one and the blue one multiple times, watered it, but nothing happens. I cannot progress. It is not clear what to do. I would be very frustrated if this was my first VR experience. 
I am glad I didn't pay for this. 
So, Starship Home has had two chances. Should I give it a third?

The meter doesn't move. Should anything happen? I used the blue one because there was a blue glow over the plant. I poured it on top of the plant. I poured it on the soil. Multiple times. Backwards and forwards to where the pink and blue thing live. Nothing happens. I tried the pink one. Same thing. Multiple times, nothing happens. 20 mins. Nothing happens.

developer_response.body: there is a meter that fills up on the plant pot when you use the right fertilizer - you just need to fill it all the way up :)

reviews.review_description: The game is fun but on the fifth plant the game won’t get any further. It says to tune the plant but after completing that, it stays stuck on that objective and won’t let me move on. I pick the next planet and click my destination on the planet scanner but it won’t get past the grow and tune plant objective

developer_response.body:
if you want to join our discord and submit a bug report here: https://discord.gg/3VAbUXJa
we can try and help get you unstuck :)

reviews.review_description: I stand by the title, this game is so simple but absolutely amazing, the best MR game ive played, the objects look quite good and gameplay is quite fun with taking care of plants and having crazy dreams, the most immersed ive been playing a game, the ending is absolutely amazing, cannot recommend enough

Tried to like it, but the windows shifting and being incredibly difficult to move about just kept taking me out of the game. 

Maybe when tracking gets better on Q4 or whatever comes next, this won't be such a pain to actually have some fun with.

developer_response.body: you may want to try playing in a room with brighter lighting as that may be affecting the tracking in the headset itself - happy to help you troubleshoot system level issues if you want to submit a ticket on our discord here: https://discord.gg/yhX7hXM6

reviews.review_title: Doesn't work at all for me (updated)
reviews.review_description:
Former problem: (left here for informational purposes)
When I start it, the splash screen pops up, then disappears, then I'm left in passthrough mode and nothing else happens even if I wait several minutes. I've tried restarting the headset, uninstalling and reinstalling, but nothing helps.

Solution:
After registering a ticket on the company Discord, I was contacted right away and after following the suggestion to clear the Quest 3 scanned spaces and rescan my room, it seems to be working fine. I'm really looking forward to exploring it. Quick and quality customer service.

developer_response.body: Not an issue we are aware of. We would love to help you solve this issue - please email us at hello@creature.email or join our discord and submit a ticket here: https://discord.gg/XPB3xbdnpB

reviews.review_description:
Hi Devs, 
I was skeptic, but this game design is really good. 
Can we have a game like „Star Trucker” in Mixed Reality? Please-Please-Please!!!
I want to transform my room to a star truck driver’s cab!!! 😊
i'm gonna need a bigger room
I am on the 7th planet and stuck with it saying I need an antigravity device… no clue what that is… I’ve put everything in the air lock and nothing is working.

developer_response.body: The bot is powered by an anti gravity device. Worth a shot ;)

reviews.review_title: Brought joy back to my gaming
reviews.review_description: I had an original oculus quest and bought the meta quest 3 several years later. I just couldn't get into it. Despite all the improvements in "specs," it didn't feel new or different. A few months in, I got this game and I've rediscovered the joy I had five and a half years ago. I didn't really like MR until this game... It just seemed to take me out of most experiences, or highlight the fact that a game wasn't really immersive. This one just does it so well, utilizing your physical space in a way that no VR experience could and no other MR experience I've done has accomplished. I felt like I was a kid again, playing make believe in my room and being totally transported by my imagination. I wasn't expecting so much narrative. I'm hoping when I get to the end of the story I can just continue to fly around and chill, but if not, I can totally see myself repeating the narrative every couple months. Thanks to those who created this magical experience.

It is a fun game,experience,and overall application I can see other individuals 
Saying it is glitchy or doesn't work but it works fine for me so I personally say
It is an overall good experience
Just played for the first time tonight. I like it. It's colorful and pretty cool
this is a fun game :-) with a few quirks. at first I thought the game wasn't saving, but then I figured out it seems to periodically need me to rebuild my room/starship.

developer_response.body: sorry to hear this. feel free to email us at hello@creature.email or join our discord here and we can try to troubleshoot this issue for you https://discord.gg/8gu9dvRy

reviews.review_description:
The most complete adventure developed for mixed reality. I wish there were more for mixed reality, that had this much of a story behind it.
Perfect that you can use the Dream Database and easily go back to dream with the plants again.
A lot of mixed reality is just those type of experiences, with no story.
Need more like this for MR.

The only thing i would recommend is adding “wall panels” to the starship delivery box. Then the instructions could say: “place over room window.” The reason is, the real windows in my room don’t really fit in with the space vibe. It’s hard seeing space in one window and bushes in the other. Maybe other people might have this problem too. 

I would also recommend save slots, so me and my brother can have different games!

Otherwise, good game! I love it!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the suggestion. Definitly something we're keeping in mind!
Good news on the save slots: They already exist :)
If you go into the settings you can select a different save slot. By default, the game loads the last used save slot (i.e. slot 1 as default).

reviews.review_description: Really done well. Me and my wife have enjoyed it. Thanks to everyone who worked on it.

This is by far the most creative game I have ever played, and a phenomenal use of mixed reality. The dream sequences are excellent and ridiculously creative. Have you ever seen in the movies where  a 3D galaxy is projected into the room, well, you literally can do that in this game, and it looks as real as in the movies. Mind blowing!  Highly recommended and well worth the money. (Played on Quest 3).

I love both plants and aliens so this is an obvious win. Incredible MR. 

this game is so super cute but minus one star for a few bugs. I noticed that we’re pretty frustrating. If there is some kind of log, I can submit these to help because I’m sure a programming something like this is crazy. The first one was after I got my first plant and would happen with subsequent new plants, I would put them on the DreamBox, but nothing. So I would have to remove and place them a few times and once I had to just restart the game. While playing for two hours, I had to restart the game at least twice to get out of a bug. Right now I have four plants and the prompt is telling me to get them to sing, but I can’t figure that out and the help guide isn’t telling me.

developer_response.body: Hi, have a look at the Progression Menu (middle button on the helm). It will tell your all your plants needs. If you require more help, you can join our Discord and shoot us a message :) https://creature.page/discord

reviews.review_description: I love the story and adore the plants. But every time I leave the game and later come back I have to re position everything. Besides that I really love it.

I think it's the most technologically advanced MR game that's been released right now. I'll save 1 star in anticipation of a better game. Language update please!!
->
Thank you for listening to my comment. 
Please consider Asian gamers too! (Korean, Japanese)

reviews.review_title: This is what Mixed Reality is about!
reviews.review_description:
This is such an unexpected and fantastic game! It truly immerses you into the setting and story, with good game play and fantastic mechanics. It starts right away and gets going immediately. 

The quality and charm of the characters and technical development is a level above most games. 

In a few moments you will start to think of your room as a spaceship!

reviews.review_title: WE NEED THE FULL SONG ON YOUTUBE
reviews.review_description: I really think it would be really cool if you guys released the full song on YouTube because it’s such a good song and I just wanna listen to it without having to be on my VR or having the plant stop singing please release it on YouTube!
It's an incredible mixed reality experience. The game is so well-designed, you can't find anything like this anywhere else.

I think the game is very nice and cute designed. And it really seems to have been designed for children. However, everything repeats itself very quickly. After the third plant, I found the fourth one rather boring and stopped playing.

Yes it is a simpler game and you have to go into it with a certain relaxed easy going mindset to enjoy it. The mixed reality aspect of it makes it so cool to play. By the time you get to the last 3 planets or so, your room is so full of stuff (if its a smallish room) that you just stop and look at it in amazement. I look forward to whats coming in other future mixed reality games. I finished the game and thoroughly enjoyed the ending. But like I said this isn't for everybody. If you are the type of person who can play, slow, chill, relaxing types of games then I think you will like this alot. If you are a hardcore action adrenaline junkie who gets bored fast, stay away.

Why I feel like crying from happiness playing this game? I feel my life’s frustration, sadness and resentment are all washed away when I’m in this starship. 

The color, music, characters, and the dreaming….  Out of this world!!!  

It became my the fav game above Half-life Alyx and the blast Clockwinder.  

Oh, yeah, and the MR is also fantastic.  I can safely recommend to anyone who starting out with VR. It will not govern you motion sickness. 

Please please do not stop. I want to play this game everyday forever.

Edit: The setup has gotten slightly better, but the objects still shift at points and I have to rearrange everything. 

The game would be amazing but the room set-up is janky for me and I have to reset it constantly. I try to put stuff on a wall and it goes in at an angle or parts of it are faded away. Other times it goes on straight but parts are occluded or it is completely recessed into the wall. Sometimes it works okay for a little and then everything shifts. It seems like every object causes problems. For instance, my blinds poke through the virtual windows in places. And forget putting the aquarium or main panel there. I’ve tried tracing the walls manually and it didn’t help at all. This sucks as it’s the largest space I have open due to other objects in my living room. I can’t be the only one with furniture, a tv, and windows, yet they seem to mess with how things are placed. If I have to set up the room every time I play and hope everything stays in the same place, I want a refund for false advertising.

If this game worked, it would be 5 stars, but it glitches. A LOT.

If you don't get to the credits, it doesn't save.  I ended up setting up the space craft 4 times. I've been kicked out of the game with glitches three times. It just freezes, stays frozen for a bit, and boots you out. And you're back at the beginning of the chapter, at best.

I uninstalled and reinstalled, but it didn't help. I really want to be able to play this game!

I suggest waiting until it's patched. Super cute graphics, great use of mixed reality, great characters, great humor.

It just doesn't work.

developer_response.body:
Hey there!! So sorry that the game has been glitching on you. It would be awesome to get some more info on what your experiencing so we can figure out how to fix it. If you're able to join our Discord and share more details (like where it's glitching, freezing, etc) that would be incredible: https://discord.gg/REPnxbFD

We want you to play the game too!!

reviews.review_description: OBSESSED with Starship Home! What an unexpectedly wonderful way to use MR. You never know what to expect with this game because it is so out of the box thinking for what a VR/MR game is. Must experience!

…please add a viewport window to the ceiling. I like how Ocean Rift mixed reality covers my ceiling fan and light with a window into the ocean outside. Something similar would go a long way in adding to the immersion. 

That said, I’ve played over an hour and I’m having TONS of fun. Thank you for a great game. Looking forward to more!

reviews.review_title: One of the best MR Games on Quest 3
reviews.review_description: Let me start by saying this game is truly a masterpiece. The mixed reality is amazing in this game and the visual quality and graphics are top notch. The voice acting is flawless as well as how the ship truly makes you feel like your living room is now a spaceship. The only issue I have encountered with the game is when I go into the dream world. When I complete the dream world and I load back into the ship sometimes the windows that I placed on the walls are moved or not on the walls at all. This is a very minor glitch in my opinion and it does not affect the game play itself, it is just a cosmetic issue that I have noticed. Other than that the game is perfect and runs beautifully on the Quest 3. If you’re looking for the next mixed reality game to add to your library this game is a must buy!!

It's basically an overpriced tech demo. It shows off some cool ways to deal with small spaces like my shoebox home, but besides being cool to look at while playing the gameplay is boring and theres tons of yapping. I don't get the great reviews. I guess people are just enamored by the cool visuals. I'm not gonna refund, but it's kinda boring. 🫤

Love the concept and I pray for somthing like this but for people above 10yrs old as the graphics are very good but childish.  Works amazing though in mixed reality.  Gimmi this but somthing realistic

reviews.review_title: Exciting New Frontier For Mixed Reality
reviews.review_description:
This game is off to a great start. I played until my battery nearly died today. The way it uses your room to anchor the experience is truly engaging, and the sense of scale and movement, particularly during travel scenes through space, is awesome. The ability to move freely around the room and investigate various aspects of gameplay, push buttons, select things floating in mid-air, turn knobs, place items into an airlock…it all feels feels really immersive. Even taking care of the plants, which I didn’t think I would like, has been fun and engaging because it’s a part of the overall story. 

Get this game! Set up the game’s windows in a space that gives you the opportunity to move around freely, so you can get that sense of being really in a spaceship. You will be wowed. Granted, the story and artsyle is a little bit on the kiddie side, but I’m enjoying it so far. Hopefully this will serve as a great showcase of what is possible with MR immersive storytelling. 

Looking forward to seeing where this goes.

How this game is getting praised so much is beyond me. I have had so many issues from this game not working properly that i grew so frustrated that i literally had to turn it off. From the hatch not reading the loader inside it. From the storage thingie twice glitching out on me. First time, the little tree thing holding the objects when you open the storage container went invisible and you couldnt see the objects, you just see a round invisible cylinder just sitting there, the second time when i put the storage container on the floor it just glitched out and completely disappeared. Another issue i had was the thing that shows me the planets glitched out and i was stuck with the alien dude to keep repeating over and over to click on the planet though i couldn't see where i needed to go. The game does a piss poor job on showing what we need to do next, we're just stuck trying everything until something happens. I, for the life of me, cannot recommend this game. Again how this game is highly recommended is mind blowing.

September 28, 2024 update.

So i managed to progress through the story a bit more and managed to find more planets and plants. Now im stuck in this one part where i did the dream sequence thing and the sound thing to tune the plant, but I can't progress. I gave it the right fertilizer thing, and i gave it water. I did the dream sequence, i did the tuning, and now im stuck. All it says is to tune the plant, which i did. Ughh😠

developer_response.body: Hey there :) sorry to hear your experience has been frustrating so far!! We really want to get this issue resolved for you and any other users, but need some more info. If you're able to join our Discord and submit a ticket, I bet we can help you figure out how to get unstuck: https://discord.gg/REPnxbFD

reviews.review_description: I have played almost everything since the original oculus, and this is my favorite title. Nothing else need be said.
This game highlights the narrative and staging potential of MR as a form. Magical, enchanting, full of wonder. Well done devs.
The render resolution is so so low in this that the whole illusion just doesn't work.
Funny quality game. I wavered between 4 or 5 stars but eventually gave it 5 because of its revolutionary and creative concept. Let it be a step towards more quality mr experiences.

reviews.review_title: The absolute future of mixed reality!
reviews.review_description: This game should set the standard of all mixed reality games to come! Great game!
Lovely Game ...Nice Plants to Care for... Wonderful Atmosphäre..

"Starship Home may unfortunately be rather limited in scope, but it’s still impressive having your room transform into your very own spaceship. Even hours into the experience, I’d still look in amazement at the beauty of the universe outside. Just don’t expect too much difficulty or content from the gameplay, and you’ll probably have yourself a wonderous experience!"

Read the full review over at The Elite Institute (dot) net!
